arts.ttl: Hojlund trolls Ronaldo with goal celebration as Denmark beat Portugal
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund performed Cristiano Ronaldo's goal celebration after scoring the winner for Denmark against Portugal in the Nations League on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Højlund nets winner vs. Portugal, hits 'Siu' celeb
arts.sum: Denmark striker Rasmus Højlund came off the bench to net the winner as his side beat Portugal 1-0 in the first leg of their Nations League quarterfinal at the Parken stadium on Thursday.

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo reacts as Rasmus Hojlund copies his goal celebration after scoring against Portugal
arts.sum: The Manchester United striker pulled out the ‘Suiii’ celebration

arts.ttl: Denmark 1-0 Portugal: Highlights, man of the match, stats as substitute Rasmus Hojlund scores the winner
arts.sum: Rasmus Hojlund proves the hero, coming off the bench to secure Denmark's 1-0 victory over Portugal in Thursday's UEFA Nations League quarter-final first leg.

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes makes penalty admission as Man Utd captain closes in on record
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes looks set to become the club's all-time leading scorer from the penalty spot and the 30-year-old has been forced to switch up his technique

arts.ttl: Cristiano Ronaldo, Viktor Gyökeres & Co. - The top all-time Nations League scorers
arts.sum: The Nations League has reached it's knockout stages again with the quarter-finals taking place this week. The Netherlands will play Spain, Portugal will go head-to-head with Denmark, France will...

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes on shirt collection and respect for his peers
arts.sum: "I have the first shirt of every first game that I do for every team that I’ve played for. All of them, the ones from Wolves, I think I could make an XI with all the Wolves shirts!

arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes reveals Man Utd goalscoring target and wants to overtake two legends
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes has scored 95 goals in 277 appearances for Manchester United and has set his sights on overtaking Andy Cole and Ole Gunnar Solskjaer in the all-time scoring charts

arts.ttl: ‘I think’: Ally McCoist says Arsenal have a player he’d rather have in his team than Bruno Fernandes
arts.sum: Bruno Fernandes and Martin Odegaard have been two of the best attacking midfield players in the Premier League in recent years. Odegaard has been criticised...

arts.ttl: Portugal XI vs Denmark – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Portugal and Denmark collide in Copenhagen this evening in the first leg of their UEFA Nations League quarter-final. Inaugural winners of the tournament in 2019, Portugal are bidding to become the first European team to win the Nations League twice.
